title: Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri
tagline: Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri — spiritual town of Haryana

overview.short: Seventh-day Adventist Church, Karnal is one of the two Protestant churchs in Nilokheri, India.
overview.description: Seventh-day Adventist Church, Karnal is one of the two Protestant churchs in Nilokheri, India. It is the only Adventist church in the area.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nilokheri
topPlaces.description: Nilokheri is a town, just 19 km from Karnal city and a municipal committee in Karnal district in the Indian state of Haryana. It has 13 wards.

topPlaces.name: The United Church, Nilokheri
topPlaces.description: The United Church, Nilokheri is one of the two Protestant churches in the Gole market area of Nilokheri, Haryana, India. It is the only Church of North India (CNI) church in the area.

topPlaces.name: Govt. Polytechnic Nilokheri
topPlaces.description: Guru Brahmanand Ji Govt. Polytechnic Institute Nilokheri is a co-educational institution of higher learning located in the town of Nilokheri in the Karnal region of Haryana.

topPlaces.name: Central Tool Room Extension Centre, Nilokheri
topPlaces.description: Central Tool Room Extension Centre, Nilokheri i.e. CTR Extension Centre, Nilokheri is a technical institute of Haryana imparting technical training for skill development of technical staff & students of engineering field.

image.alt: Central Tool Room Extension Centre, Nilokheri

topPlaces.name: Anjanthali
topPlaces.description: Anjanthali is a village in Nilokheri sub-district of Karnal district, Haryana, India. The village is famous for the Mata Anjana Devi mandir temple of great Mata Añjanā, the mother of Lord Hanuman in the Indian epic, the Ramayana.

topPlaces.name: Ganger, Karnal
topPlaces.description: Ganger or Gangar (Village ID 59169) is a small village in the Karnal district of Haryana state of India. It is about 13 km from Karnal on National Highway 44 across from the larger town of Taraori.

topPlaces.name: Taraori
topPlaces.description: Taraori, or Tarori or Tarawari, as it is sometimes called in the local dialect, is a town (Municipal committee) in Nilokheri Tehsil of Karnal district in the Indian state of Haryana. It is situated off NH-44, 14 km north of Karnal.

topPlaces.name: Nadana
topPlaces.description: Nandana is a village near Taraori in Haryana, India. It is famous for its basmati rice.

items.note: Nilokheri is a town, just 19 km from Karnal city and a municipal committee in Karnal district in the Indian state of Haryana. It has 13 wards.
The United Church, Nilokheri is one of the two Protestant churches in the Gole market area of Nilokheri, Haryana, India. It is the only Church of North India (CNI) church in the area.
Guru Brahmanand Ji Govt. Polytechnic Institute Nilokheri is a co-educational institution of higher learning located in the town of Nilokheri in the Karnal region of Haryana.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Ambala Cantt Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri?
faq.a: Stays in Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Seventh-day Adventist Church, Nilokheri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nilokheri, The United Church, Nilokheri, Govt. Polytechnic Nilokheri, Central Tool Room Extension Centre, Nilokheri, Anjanthali.
